title: Glitch's Vanilla Plus
description: A vanilla plus modpack that is just really pretty cool.
body:
Glitch's Vanilla Plus is a modpack that lets you have an amazing-looking game and have some new items and fixes that you *need*. Each mod in this pack has been hand-picked for lots of fun. Because of its features, I use this pack almost always when playing. I have never encountered issues with the current release version. Not only that, but I will also make sure to keep it up to date with the latest versions of Minecraft as soon as all the mod dependencies have been worked out.
Compatibility Client Side: Required Server Side: Optional (No extra features)
Install Guide **First Path: Downloading Automatically** 1. Make sure you have a Modrinth pack browsing and installing Minecraft launcher. (Modrinth App, Prism Launcher) 2. Add a new instance by looking up Fast and Beautiful on the Modrinth search function **Second Path: Downloading Manually** 1. Make sure you have a Modrinth-pack compatible Minecraft launcher. (Modrinth App, Prism Launcher, MultiMC) 2. Download the pack with the .mrpack file on the side of your screen. 3. Run the file. 4. You should see some install pop up. Follow the steps. 5. Congratulations! You now have Fast and Beautiful installed.
